ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rides" (
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride */,
  "pickup_location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the pickup location */,
  "dropoff_location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the dropoff location */,
  "ride_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the ride type */,
  "pickup_dow" INTEGER /* Day of the week the ride started (1-7) */,
  "pickup_hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day the ride started (0-23) */,
  "trip_distance" REAL /* Distance of the ride in miles */,
  "trip_duration" REAL /* Duration of the ride in minutes */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Fare amount for the ride */,
  "tpep_pickup_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the ride started */,
  "tpep_dropoff_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the ride ended */,
  "traffic_condition" TEXT /* Traffic condition during the ride */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition during the ride */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment used for the ride */,
  "rate_code_id" INTEGER /* Rate code ID for the ride */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_dropoff_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("dropoff_location_id") REFERENCES dropoff_locations ("dropoff_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_pickup_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("pickup_location_id") REFERENCES pickup_locations ("pickup_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_ride_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_type_id") REFERENCES ride_types ("ride_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_types" (
  "ride_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride type */,
  "ride_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ride type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ride type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pickup_locations" (
  "pickup_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pickup location */,
  "pickup_zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the pickup location */,
  "pickup_borough" TEXT /* Borough of the pickup location */,
  "pickup_neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood of the pickup location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the pickup location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the pickup location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pickup_location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dropoff_locations" (
  "dropoff_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dropoff location */,
  "dropoff_zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the dropoff location */,
  "dropoff_borough" TEXT /* Borough of the dropoff location */,
  "dropoff_neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood of the dropoff location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the dropoff location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the dropoff location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dropoff_location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, data scientist, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view ride data, edit ride data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the ride */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the ride */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the ride */,
  "min_speed" REAL /* Minimum speed of the ride */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_analytics_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_conditions" (
  "traffic_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_types" (
  "payment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment type */,
  "payment_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_codes" (
  "rate_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate code */,
  "rate_code_name" TEXT /* Name of the rate code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rate code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_code_id")
)
